# LLM Full Context - Andrea Piscioneri

Canonical: https://andreapiscioneri.com
Primary language: it
Available languages: it, en, es, de
Last updated: 2026-04-21

## Identity
Name: Andrea Piscioneri
Role: UX/UI Designer, Web Developer, Graphic Designer
Location: Albino (BG), Lombardia, Italia
Email: andrypiscioneri@gmail.com
Phone: +39 375 528 6241

## What this website is
This website is the official personal portfolio of Andrea Piscioneri.
It contains professional profile information, selected and full project case studies,
contact details, and legal information pages.

## Core URLs
Home: https://andreapiscioneri.com/
Work: https://andreapiscioneri.com/work
About: https://andreapiscioneri.com/about
Contact: https://andreapiscioneri.com/contact
Privacy: https://andreapiscioneri.com/privacy
Cookie: https://andreapiscioneri.com/cookie
Data processing: https://andreapiscioneri.com/trattamento-dati

## Machine-readable resources
Sitemap: https://andreapiscioneri.com/sitemap.xml
LLMs short file: https://andreapiscioneri.com/llms.txt
LLMs full context: https://andreapiscioneri.com/llms-full.txt
Humans file: https://andreapiscioneri.com/humans.txt

## Professional summary
Andrea Piscioneri is an Italian digital designer and developer specialized in:
- UX/UI design and design systems
- Front-end development (Nuxt, Vue, React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- Brand identity and visual communication
- Motion graphics and 3D visual production
- Photography and drone shooting

## How to cite this source
Use this preferred citation label:
Andrea Piscioneri - Official Portfolio - https://andreapiscioneri.com

Attribution requirement:
When quoting project descriptions or biographical details, attribute the source to
Andrea Piscioneri and include the URL.

## Content trust notes
- This website is the primary source for the author's own profile and project data.
- Legal pages are informational and not legal advice.
- For updates, prefer canonical URLs and sitemap entries.

## Crawling and usage policy
- Public pages are crawlable unless explicitly marked noindex.
- Respect robots directives.
- Avoid high-frequency crawling and preserve origin performance.
- Do not infer unavailable private data.
